title: hieracium murorum subsp. habromorphum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. habromorphum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species with yellow flowers and a leafy, branching stem. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hawkweed include wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Hawkweed, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds.
